hypothesis: E-28: DIoU + center=0.0. DIoU already penalizes center-point distance in the IoU term. Hypothesis: DIoU alone can match or exceed GIoU+center=0.2 (E-18, 0.2807), making the separate center loss redundant. If E-28 ≈ E-27 (0.283) or better, DIoU alone simplifies the loss function. If E-28 << E-27, center loss adds value beyond DIoU's built-in penalty. 8ep probe vs E-27 (DIoU+ctr0.2, 0.2831) and E-16 (GIoU+ctr0.0, 0.2604).
